# Brownfield Migration Spec — a loan origination monolith on Tomcat 8 lift-and-shifted to EC2

## Application Summary
a loan origination monolith on Tomcat 8 lift-and-shifted to EC2

## Modernization Scope
all four integrations are in scope full app refactor

## Integration Inventory

### Integration: INT-001 — Applicant portal
- **Technology + version:** Spring MVC 4 on Tomcat 8
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** hard-cutover
- **API surface / contract:** internal pages
- **State management:** session sticky
- **Data volume + SLA:** 800K sessions/day p95 < 700ms
- **Target intent:** React SPA on CloudFront
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-002 — Origination core
- **Technology + version:** Spring Boot 2 monolith
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** critical
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** internal REST documented
- **State management:** stateful
- **Data volume + SLA:** 2M requests/day p95 < 500ms
- **Target intent:** Spring Boot services on ECS
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-003 — Credit bureau API
- **Technology + version:** Apigee client v1 cross-cloud
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** read-only
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** OpenAPI 3.0 documented
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** 600K calls/day p95 < 400ms
- **Target intent:** Apigee GCP client cross-cloud
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

## Non-Functional Requirements (Application-Wide)
- comply with SOX and GLBA controls
